name: input
title: Input
description: Text input supporting text, email, tel, url, search, and password types. Search type includes auto clear button.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.

disabled.description: Standard disabled state; Angular forms set this automatically.

clearIcon.description: Custom clear icon for search type.

clearLabel.description: Localizable accessible label for the search clear action.
